summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KYC manual queue feature. The new '+ Queue User' button and manual queue endpoint are working correctly. Verified that admins can manually queue users for KYC review, with proper validation and error handling.

minor_issues.issue: Some rejected transfers missing rejection_reason field
minor_issues.impact: Minor - doesn't affect functionality, just missing data in some old records

passed_tests: Admin can view KYC queue with pending applications
'+ Queue User' button is visible and clickable in KYC Queue page
Manual queue modal opens correctly with proper form fields
Manual queue endpoint POST /api/v1/admin/kyc/queue-user works correctly
Proper validation: Cannot queue non-existent users (returns 404)
Proper validation: Cannot re-queue already APPROVED KYC (returns 400)
Proper validation: Can queue users with DRAFT/SUBMITTED status
KYC queue displays applications with correct status badges
Admin can navigate between different admin sections
All admin notification bell endpoints working (KYC, Cards, Transfers, Tickets)
KYC date formats display correctly (no 'Invalid Date' issues)
User can view their own accounts

details: Button '+ Queue User' is present in KYC Queue page
Modal UI is clean and functional with email and reason fields
Backend endpoint validates user existence (404 for non-existent users)
Backend endpoint validates KYC status (400 for already approved KYC)
Backend endpoint successfully queues users with DRAFT/SUBMITTED status
Their KYC status is APPROVED (not in pending queue)
Manual queue feature allows admins to queue users who had submission issues
Submitted KYC applications appear in admin queue with SUBMITTED status
Admin can view pending applications (2 found: Agente Agente, Ashe)
KYC queue displays correct information (name, status, documents count, submission date)
